title: Constant Contact vs Sender (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Sender: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Sender: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Sender comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Sender targets small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting A Generous Free Plan

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting a generous free plan

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Sender?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Sender is stronger for small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Sender?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sender to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
